items.name: create-t3-app
items.blurb: Opinionated full-stack Next.js starter with TypeScript, tRPC, Tailwind, and Prisma.

items.name: ShipFast
items.blurb: Next.js boilerplate with auth, payments, email, and SEO wired up for fast SaaS launches.

items.name: Supastarter
items.blurb: Next.js and Nuxt SaaS starter kit with Supabase, billing, i18n, and a component library.

items.name: Next.js SaaS Starter
items.blurb: Vercel-maintained starter with Postgres, Stripe, and shadcn/ui for building SaaS products.

items.name: Divjoy
items.blurb: Codebase generator for React SaaS apps supporting multiple auth, database, and UI choices.

items.name: Open SaaS by Wasp
items.blurb: Free, open-source SaaS boilerplate built with Wasp, React, and Node.js including auth and billing.

items.name: Refine
items.blurb: React meta-framework for building internal tools, admin panels, and CRUD-heavy SaaS apps.

items.name: Volca
items.blurb: Node.js and React SaaS starter with AWS infrastructure, Stripe billing, and user management.

items.name: SaaS Pegasus
items.blurb: Django boilerplate with teams, subscriptions, React or HTMX front-end, and Celery support.

items.name: Gravity
items.blurb: Django SaaS starter kit providing auth, billing, teams, and a React front-end out of the box.

items.name: Jumpstart Rails
items.blurb: Rails SaaS template by Chris Oliver with Stripe billing, multitenancy, and Hotwire front-end.

items.name: Bullet Train
items.blurb: Open-source Rails SaaS framework with teams, roles, permissions, and API scaffolding built in.

items.name: Laravel Spark
items.blurb: Official Laravel package providing subscription billing scaffolding backed by Stripe or Paddle.

items.name: Wave
items.blurb: Laravel SaaS boilerplate with subscription billing, user profiles, and a Filament admin panel.

items.name: Makerkit
items.blurb: Next.js and Remix SaaS starter with Supabase or Firebase, multi-tenancy, and Stripe billing.
